Off Calendar Apr-08-2024 Continued To Oct-07-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Brittany Riley appeared by zoom for Olivia Borsella.

Mrs. Riley requested a 6-month continuance stating that a new administrator and trustee have been appointed in the San Mateo County matter and that they are working diligently to get this resolved. Status on close of estate is continued to October 7, 2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Either a petition for final distribution, or a petition for approval of a report on status of administration is to be filed prior to the hearing date.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: D. Nguyen. Not reported.
